title: The Hollow Bishop
summary: A ritual-looking homicide in a locked church office.
handlerPrompts: Review the vestry ledger before filing an accusation.
The church finances are dirtier than the crime scene.

evidence.title: Parish Ledger Extract
evidence.summary: A torn ledger page records an off-books transfer approved by Bishop Vale.

evidence.title: Vestry Scene Photo
evidence.summary: A still image captures the chalice beside the vestry desk after the disturbance.

evidence.title: Vestry Interview Transcript
evidence.summary: A groundskeeper describes the silver chalice found beside the victim's desk.
